subcodes.title: Conversation with Hans Springer, Haifa, 1914-06-30
subcodes.first_line: Thou art welcome. Where didst thou come from?... Dost thou travel always on the surface of the earth?
subcodes.first_line_orig: آیا تو همیشه روی زمین سفر مینمائی  در فکر آن نیستی که سفری بآسمان کنی
subcodes.subjects: @Christ; Christianity, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @love of God, @spiritual transformation, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @universal language
